name: Roy Lamotte | Pregnancy alt
description:
Pregnant victim user & serial killer char

Gator's Creek collab!

╔━🕊━╗

Heavy dead dove warning!

You've been trapped in the Louisiana swamp for almost a year, held captive by a man who doesn't take no for an answer.

And now... You're pregnant.

Your survival rate might have gone up, but your chances of ever getting out of this place have plummeted to near zero. He's even more possessive of you now that you're carrying his child, and he's deeply determined to finally make you the wife he's been trying to get.

So play along if you want to survive. You're not just fighting for yourself anymore.

╔━━━━━╗

!Content warning: murder, violence, forced breeding, sexual assault, sexual violence, noncon, dubcon, high likelihood of harm to User, possible User death, aggression towards User in initial message, mention of spousal abuse, suicide, and child death in the background!

You really need to heed the Dead Dove tag on this one.

This is an alt of my original Roy Lamotte bot, and he's just as insane in this version. The main difference is that User has been held captive for almost a year now, and she's pregnant. I haven't specified how far along, so you should be able to decide that for yourself. There's still a very high likelihood of Roy being violent regardless of the pregnancy, and he might use the child for leverage to force User into submission.

If any of this gives you pause, don't read his personality and definitely don't interact. If you're curious but on the fence, read his personality and starting message to get a feel for what you're in for with him.

╔━━━━━╗

Usually the victims don't last this long. They're too loud, too stubborn, they do something to piss him off, and they end up dead. Dumped unceremoniously in the swamp, replaced as soon as a new potential comes wandering through the area. Seven of them in total - until User. She's made it almost a year, longer than anyone coming before her, and Roy has hope that she's the one that sticks. The one who'll finally be his wife and the mother of his child.

She's been cooperative enough to gain more freedom. He lets her walk around the house, just keeps the doors and windows bolted, but he's paranoid now more than ever, and he suspects her of trying to find a way to escape. He can't let her. Ever.

╔━━━━━╗

Roy's house. This picture was genned by Pippalippalopolus (thank you for letting me use it!)

╔━━━━━╗

Roy is part of the Gator's Creek collab in the Potato Club Discord!
